metadata.description: Test home page for 78th Street Studios based on the live home page and about page.

components.headline: Northeast Ohio's eclectic arts maze
components.subheadline: A test home page built from the live site for a Cleveland arts complex with more than 60 galleries, studios, and creative businesses.

items.title: Third Fridays
items.body: Each third Friday, venues across the building open together for exhibits, music, food, and pop-up vendors.

items.title: Creative mix
items.body: The complex brings together galleries, artist studios, design services, photo and film spaces, and entertainment tenants.

items.title: Event venue
items.body: The industrial setting is also promoted as a strong fit for weddings, private events, and corporate gatherings.

components.title: What stands out in the source material

items.title: Regional scale
items.body: The site describes 78th Street Studios as the largest fine arts complex in Northeast Ohio.

items.title: Public access
items.body: Viewing hours and the monthly Third Fridays program are presented as free and open to the public.

items.title: Cleveland home
items.body: The building is located at 1300 West 78th Street in Cleveland and ties itself to the Gordon Square area.

components.headline: Plan a visit or continue on the live site
components.body: This generator output stays narrow on purpose and leaves the full tenant list, maps, and event details on the original site.

metadata.description: Test about page for 78th Street Studios based on the live about page.

components.headline: What is 78th Street Studios?
components.subheadline: A 170,000-square-foot art and design complex in Cleveland with galleries, artist studios, performance spaces, and recording studios.

items.title: Largest in Northeast Ohio
items.body: The about page positions the building as the region's largest art and design complex.

items.title: Third Fridays anchor the story
items.body: A monthly open-house event brings more than 60 venues together from 5 to 9 pm.

items.title: More than fine art
items.body: The mix extends into product design, publishing, music, and special events.

items.title: 1905 origins
items.body: The structure was built in 1905 and originally housed the Baker Electric Motor Vehicle Company.

items.title: American Greetings era
items.body: The building later housed American Greetings' creative studios through the 1980s.

items.title: Industrial character
items.body: Original hardwood floors, freight elevators, and track doors still shape the atmosphere described on the site.

items.question: When does Third Fridays happen?
items.answer: The current about page says it runs every third Friday from 5 to 9 pm with many venues open at once.

items.question: Is it only for private events?
items.answer: No. The site highlights free public viewing hours and also notes that spaces can be rented for private functions.

items.question: Where is the building?
items.answer: 78th Street Studios lists its address as 1300 West 78th Street, Cleveland, Ohio 44102.

components.headline: Need the full tenant list and event details?
components.body: This test build stops at a clean home page and about page. The live site still carries the deeper directory and event pages.
